name: Upper Tana Catchment Forest Protection
notes: Mau Complex-style programme scaled to Tana headwaters. 18
column12: 000 ha protected. Deforestation on communal land adjacent to gazetted forest continues.

name: Embu-Tharaka Nithi River Coordination
notes: Thiba and Rupingazi rivers cross county boundaries. Joint flood management framework drafted 2020. Not signed. Political relationship between the two counties is the primary barrier.

name: Embu Town Drainage Upgrade
notes: Design complete 2020. Phase 1 procurement delayed by staff changes in county engineering department. Currently under procurement.

name: Mt Kenya Glacial Melt Monitoring
notes: Monitoring programme established. Glacial retreat documented. Downstream flood timing shifts identified. Not integrated into county flood planning.
